MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Jared Allen.
Attorney John Zanghi appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Rebecca Sanchez is present.
Attorney John-Paul S. Deol representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of FEB-11-2013 is vacated.
